author: Lateraled
text:
spec: forge-gated delivery and configurable integration branch

Draft design under docs/SPEC-forge-gated-delivery.md for epic bl-00ca.
Two opt-in extensions: configurable target_branch and a deferred
delivery mode that hands the squash to an external forge.

Backwards compatibility comes from reusing the existing gates primitive
to enforce the "awaiting external merge" hold; old bl clients refuse
bl close on a gated parent without any new code.
